title: Payment Options for Ethiopian Digital Creators: The Reality Check Every Creator Needs
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're an Ethiopian digital creator, and you're at your wit's end trying to get paid for your hard work. You've tried to use PayPal, but it's been blocked due to banking restrictions. You've also tried Stripe, but their KYC requirements have made it impossible to get verified. You're not alone – thousands of creators in the region face the same challenges. But the truth is, it doesn't have to be this way. There are payment options available that don't require a PayPal or Stripe account, and they're more secure and reliable than you think. In this post, we'll take a hard look at the reality of payment options for Ethiopian digital creators, and we'll show you a better way to get paid for your work.
The Honest Reality Most Creators Avoid

The reality is that most payment processors, including PayPal and Stripe, have strict KYC requirements that make it difficult for creators in certain countries to get verified. This means that even if you have a legitimate business and a bank account, you may still be unable to use these services. And if you try to use alternative payment methods, you may be left vulnerable to scams and security breaches. It's a Catch-22 that's frustrating and unfair, and it's one that we're going to tackle head-on in this post.
Why the Popular Advice Is Wrong

You may have heard that the solution to this problem is to use a VPN or a proxy server to circumvent the payment processor's restrictions. But the truth is, this is not a reliable or secure solution. Not only can it get you banned from the payment processor's system, but it also puts your account and sensitive information at risk of being compromised. And in the end, it's just a Band-Aid solution that doesn't address the underlying issue. We need a better way to get paid, one that doesn't involve compromising our security or our integrity.
